_comment_strategy: Strategy to backtest: MMXM | OTE | ZGMT | MACRO
_comment_timezone: Set to 3 for EET (MT5 default broker server time offset from UTC)
_comment_pairs: All pairs including metals. Must match config.json pairs list
_comment_balance: Initial balance and risk — risk is overridden in config.json (set high for backtesting)

data_source._comment_mode: Set mode to 'mt5' to auto-fetch from MetaTrader 5 (must be open)
data_source._comment_csv: Used only when mode=csv. Put CSV files here named: EURUSD_M1.csv etc.
